_comment_what_is_this: This file tells Claude Desktop about your MCP servers.
Claude Desktop reads this file at startup and launches/connects to your agents.
WHERE TO PUT THIS FILE (do NOT put it in your project folder):
Mac:     ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
Windows: %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json
Linux:   ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
HOW TO APPLY CHANGES:
1. Copy the mcpServers entry from this file
2. Paste it into the real config file at the path above
3. Replace YOUR_PROJECT_PATH with your actual path (see below)
4. Fully quit Claude Desktop (not just close the window)
Mac:     Cmd+Q
Windows: Right-click taskbar icon → Quit
Linux:   Close from system tray
5. Reopen Claude Desktop
6. The agents will appear as available tools
YOUR_PROJECT_PATH — find it by running in terminal:
Mac/Linux:  cd flight-booking-agents && pwd
Windows:    cd flight-booking-agents && cd
Mac example:     /Users/yourname/projects/flight-booking-agents
Windows example: C:\Users\yourname\projects\flight-booking-agents
Linux example:   /home/yourname/projects/flight-booking-agents
PYTHON COMMAND — use the right one for your OS:
Mac/Linux:  python3   (use this if 'python' gives 'command not found')
Windows:    python    (installed from python.org or Microsoft Store)
Check which works on your machine:
python --version
python3 --version
WHICH AGENTS NEED TO BE RUNNING MANUALLY:
flight-search-agent      → AUTO launched by Claude Desktop (STDIO)
flight-notification-agent → AUTO launched by Claude Desktop (STDIO wrapper)
You must run these yourself in separate terminals:
python3 agents/booking_agent/server.py      (port 8001)
python3 agents/notification_agent/server.py (port 8002)

_comment: Claude Desktop auto-launches this as a child process.
No need to run it manually.
Leave as YOUR_KEY_HERE to use mock data (recommended for learning)
Add your real key from https://aviationstack.com to use live flights
Note: Free tier only shows live flights, not future date searches
BUT the notification HTTP server must also be running:

_comment_booking_agent: The Booking Agent is NOT listed in mcpServers because:
It is an HTTP server — Claude Desktop does not launch HTTP servers.
You run it yourself: python3 agents/booking_agent/server.py
The Orchestrator calls it directly via HTTP on port 8001.
